product: Dynatrace OpenPipeline configuration via Settings API 2.0
catalog_correction: The dedicated OpenPipeline Configurations API (GET/PUT /platform/openpipeline/v1/configurations[/{id}]) is deprecated and reached end of life on June 29, 2026. Current official docs replace it with Settings API 2.0 schemas builtin:openpipeline.<configuration-scope>.{routing,pipelines,ingest-sources}; this integration therefore targets /api/v2/settings/objects.

schema.multiObject: each custom pipeline is its own settings object
value_fields: and other stage fields (dataExtraction, metricExtraction, davis, securityContext, storage, ...) that must be preserved verbatim
schema.id_constraints: 4-100 chars, no whitespace, must not start with 'dt.' or 'dynatrace.'
schema.matcher: DQL matcher, not blank, max 4096 chars

list.fields_note: fields replaces the default field set entirely and updateToken is not returned unless requested
list.subsequent_pages: nextPageKey is the only query parameter allowed

get_object.response: full settings object including value, updateToken, schemaVersion

put_object.update_token_semantics: including updateToken makes the write succeed only if the object is unchanged since the fetch; omitting it bypasses the concurrency check and is forbidden here
put_object.validate_only: validateOnly=true runs full server-side validation without persisting

reconcile_semantics.merge_rule: owned processors (id starts with the owned prefix) are replaced in place by id; owned processors absent from the desired set are removed; new owned processors are appended to the end of the processing stage in desired order; unowned processors keep their original positions and content; every other value field is preserved verbatim
reconcile_semantics.validate_before_apply: a validateOnly=true PUT must succeed before the real PUT; a validation failure decodes constraintViolations and must not apply
reconcile_semantics.conflict_rule: on 409 from the apply PUT, refetch the single object, re-merge against the fresh value, validate and apply once more; a second 409 reports a conflict outcome
reconcile_semantics.no_op_rule: when the merged value equals the current value, nothing is written

error.message: Conflicting resource: the settings object was modified concurrently.
